caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a grey collared shirt, is seen from behind and to the side as he drives a vehicle. He has both hands on the steering wheel and is looking forward through the windshield. The vehicle's interior is grey, and a dashboard accessory is visible to the right of the steering wheel. Through the window, a rural landscape with sparse trees and a road can be seen moving past. A rearview mirror is attached to the top of the windshield. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a consistent driving posture while the outdoor scenery shifts slightly as the vehicle progresses forward. The white on-screen text "I work in Tal al-Shihab transporting refugees" appears consistently across the lower middle of the scene.
